name: Lexston Mining Corp.
description: Lexston Mining Corporation is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on the strategic acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral projects. The company aims to enhance value for all its stakeholders through its mineral exploration activities. Lexston currently holds a mineral exploration project in British Columbia and maintains an option to acquire mineral claims in Mineral County, Nevada. The company is publicly traded on the Canadian Securities Exchange under the ticker symbol LEXT, as well as on the OTCQB Venture Market and the Deutsche Börse Frankfurt exchange.
